title: Reboot Hub Illustrative Repair-Risk Record
description: Schema for the four illustrative records in sample_records.jsonl. It is not the schema for the complete 43-row aircraft-model price summary.

segment.description: Market segment such as compact creator drone, FPV drone, or professional camera drone.

listed_price_low_usd.description: Lowest observed Reboot Hub listed bundle price in USD.

listed_price_high_usd.description: Highest observed Reboot Hub listed bundle price in USD.

price_basis.description: Explanation of what the price range includes.
